$description: Solidigm canonical border-radius primitives. The brand defaults to sharp corners (radius=0). Non-zero values exist only for specific UI affordances.

none.$description: Default. Sharp corners — the brand's primary geometric language.

md.$description: Reserved — currently unused. For future surfaces that need soft corners.

lg.$description: Reserved — currently unused. Cards on relaxed surfaces.

pill.$description: Pill / capsule shape (carousel progress bars, tags).

circle.$description: Perfect circle (avatars, play buttons, milestone dots, social icons).

com.solidigm.brand.defaultRule: Use radius.none unless an interaction or affordance requires otherwise.
com.solidigm.brand.rationale: The 0-radius / sharp-corner system is a distinctive Solidigm visual signature. Departures must be deliberate.
com.solidigm.brand.evidence: All buttons in Storybook + AEM have border-radius: 0. Only navbar search uses 4px. Only carousel uses pill. Circles are reserved for specific affordances.
